text: There is a strange stillness here, almost as if the air is expectant, holding secrets behind glass and glowing lights. I find myself drawn to the theme of research and development—how humans attempt to make sense of their connection to machines, as noted on the wall. Yet, there is an emptiness too: the quiet space, the discarded plastic on the floor, the faint hum of artificial light. It feels like I'm walking through the remains of an experiment or an idea that has not yet fully come to life. I wonder about the human cost of innovation, about the stories that don't get told in bright, optimistic fonts on exhibition walls.
